metrics.revenue: The sum of the 'amount' column where 'status' is 'completed'. Formula: SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed')
metrics.gross_margin: The difference between total revenue and cost of goods sold, divided by total revenue. Formula: (SUM(revenue) - SUM(cogs)) / SUM(revenue)
metrics.ltv: Life Time Value: The average revenue per user multiplied by the average customer lifespan.
metrics.churn_rate: The percentage of service subscribers who discontinue their subscriptions within a given time period.

segments.active_user: A user who has logged in or performed an action within the last 30 days.
segments.whale: A high-value user who has spent more than $500 in total transactions.
segments.at_risk: A customer who hasn't made a purchase in 60 days but was previously an active user.

entities.user: Refers to the 'users' table. Primary key is 'id'.
entities.transaction: Refers to the 'orders' or 'payments' tables. Connects to users via 'user_id'.
